title: juncus gesneri
intro: Juncus gesneri, also known as Gesner's rush or Gesner's jointed rush, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Juncaceae. It is a perennial herb that has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and acting as a natural diuretic. Juncus gesneri can be prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, and its rhizomes can be dried and used in various herbal remedies, such as infusions, tinctures, and salves.
